svg.title: FitTrack logo
svg.desc: FitTrack wordmark with an abstract geometric hexagon mark in dark purple tones

polygon.style: fill: none; stroke: rgb(147, 51, 234); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 0.9; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto;

fill: none; stroke: rgb(124, 34, 206); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 0.7; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto;
